personal_profile.headline: Backend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Engineer with recent Python API and AWS platform experience plus older Java legacy work.

bullets.text: Built FastAPI services for customer billing and usage events, improving API response consistency for external clients.
Added contract tests and deployment checks that reduced integration regressions during weekly releases.
Migrated billing workloads to AWS ECS and automated rollout checks for REST API services.
Introduced service dashboards and alerting to shorten time to detect API failures.
Maintained a Struts monolith and handled defect tickets for internal banking workflows.
Ran manual test scripts and triaged browser bugs for legacy applications.

projects.name: Billing API Migration
projects.summary: Migrated billing integrations onto a cleaner Python API surface.

bullets.text: Reworked billing endpoints into versioned FastAPI services and removed brittle partner-specific flows.
Fixed mobile UI bugs and patched release issues for a retail pilot app.
